Registry / Terms / durability protection facility

durability protection facility

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01874 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

3 distinct definitions across 4 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
facility that is incorporated in a measuring instrument which enables the detection of and action upon significant durability errors
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102004OIML R 135:20042.3501874pending
202X2004OIML R 135:20042.3501874pending

2 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2013OIML D011:20133.2002240-D011
facility incorporated in a measuring instrument that enables significant durability errors to be detected and acted upon
pending
20102004OIML D 11:20043.1900248
facility that is incorporated in a measuring instrument and which enables significant durability errors to be detected and acted upon
pending
